title: A Morning in Imlil
author: The Miller Family
content: Our children woke up to the sound of donkey bells echoing through the valley. We spent the afternoon learning how to bake bread in an outdoor clay oven with Fatima. A truly grounding experience.

title: Starlit Sahara Conversations
author: David & Sarah
content: Far from the city lights, the sky above Merzouga feels heavy with stars. We sat around the fire listening to nomad songs that have been sung for generations. We felt like we were part of something timeless.
